name: firesim
description: Real-time 3D fire and fluid simulation powered by WebGPU compute shaders
author: Alex F

scripts.gpu:health: npx playwright test tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js && node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs
scripts.gpu:health:clear: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CLEAR_SITE_DATA='1'; npx playwright test tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js; node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs"
scripts.gpu:health:headed: npx playwright test --headed tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js && node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs
scripts.gpu:health:clear:headed: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CLEAR_SITE_DATA='1'; npx playwright test --headed tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js; node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs"
scripts.gpu:health:chrome: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PLAYWRIGHT_CHANNEL='chrome'; npx playwright test --headed tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js; node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs"
scripts.gpu:health:edge: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PLAYWRIGHT_CHANNEL='msedge'; npx playwright test --headed tests/stability/gpu-health.spec.js; node scripts/gpu-health-summary.mjs"
